title: Bright Starts Grab and Spin Baby Rattle and BPA-Free Teether Toy, Ages 3 Months +
features: Shake and spin for silly fun
Teether ring’s textured handle provides soothing relief
Easy for little hands to hold
Made for infants 3 months and up
description: Time to shake things up at playtime! With the Grab & Spin Rattle toy by Bright Starts, your little noisemaker will spend hours maneuvering this take-along toy. Made for tiny fingers, the keyring shape is easy to grab… and safe for teething too! The textured handle features a ribbed design to help soothe sore gums, and the two sliding pieces help reach those tough teething spots. Your baby will love the spinning rattle chamber and all the fun sounds it makes. Sometimes the littlest toys bring out the biggest smiles.
